title: Fix live game abbreviation alias gaps
objective: Make same-day live markets using Polymarket/Kalshi abbreviations cws and oak match ESPN registry teams CHW and ATH so TOR@CWS and HOU@OAK are not dropped as no_registry_match.
inputs: current shadow loop logs showing no_registry_match for tor-cws and hou-oak
current recommendation_api.py discovery and matching code
acceptance_criteria: TOR@CWS same-day live market no longer drops as no_registry_match
HOU@OAK same-day live market no longer drops as no_registry_match
discovery coverage increases for those live games if markets exist
no change to model logic or execution behavior
